metadata.description: Profession-specific Claude plugins from The AI Career Lab — 32 plugins covering healthcare, legal, financial, real estate, business, design, education, events, and the trades. Each plugin installs slash commands and auto-activating skills tailored to the writing workflows of a specific profession.

plugins.name: pharmacist
plugins.description: Review drug interactions, check dosing protocols, and draft patient counseling notes

plugins.name: physical-therapist
plugins.description: Draft SOAP notes, build exercise programs, and write insurance appeal letters

plugins.name: occupational-therapist
plugins.description: Draft SOAP notes, treatment plans, progress reports, and home exercise programs for occupational therapy

plugins.name: nurse
plugins.description: Draft nursing notes, create shift handoffs, build care plans, and generate patient education materials

plugins.name: therapist
plugins.description: Draft session notes, build treatment plans, write pre-authorization letters, and generate client correspondence

plugins.name: chiropractor
plugins.description: Chart SOAP notes, draft medical necessity letters, and generate practice marketing content

plugins.name: dental-hygienist
plugins.description: Document periodontal findings, write insurance narratives, and create patient education materials

plugins.name: optometrist
plugins.description: Document eye exams, draft referral letters, create patient education materials, and write insurance narratives

plugins.name: veterinarian
plugins.description: Draft SOAP notes, write discharge summaries, and generate client communications

plugins.name: speech-language-pathologist
plugins.description: Write therapy notes, draft IEP goals, and create therapy materials for speech-language pathologists

plugins.name: dietitian
plugins.description: Generate nutrition assessments, meal plans, progress notes, and client education materials for dietitians

plugins.name: personal-trainer
plugins.description: Build workout programs, write nutrition plans, and generate client reports

plugins.name: attorney
plugins.description: Draft client memos, demand letters, contract summaries, and billing narratives

plugins.name: paralegal
plugins.description: Draft legal documents, summarize cases, and write client correspondence

plugins.name: financial-advisor
plugins.description: Build plan summaries, draft portfolio reviews, and prepare client meeting documentation

plugins.name: bookkeeper
plugins.description: Draft financial summaries, prepare reconciliation reports, and generate client communications

plugins.name: insurance-agent
plugins.description: Summarize policies, draft renewal letters, and generate claims documentation

plugins.name: mortgage-broker
plugins.description: Generate rate comparisons, draft pre-approval letters, and create client communications for mortgage lending

plugins.name: real-estate
plugins.description: Write listing descriptions, draft client emails, and create market analysis narratives

plugins.name: property-manager
plugins.description: Draft tenant notices, board reports, vendor emails, and budget narratives for property management

plugins.name: management-consultant
plugins.description: Draft client proposals, write executive summaries, and turn meetings into action plans

plugins.name: executive-assistant
plugins.description: Triage inboxes, prep meetings, and draft follow-ups that keep executives moving

plugins.name: hr-manager
plugins.description: Write job descriptions, draft policies, and create onboarding materials

plugins.name: recruiter
plugins.description: Write job descriptions, draft candidate outreach, and build interview scorecards

plugins.name: sales-rep
plugins.description: Research prospects, draft proposals, and write follow-up sequences for sales reps

plugins.name: social-media-manager
plugins.description: Generate social captions, build content calendars, and draft client performance reports

plugins.name: interior-designer
plugins.description: Write project proposals, draft spec sheets, and create client presentations

plugins.name: photographer
plugins.description: Create client proposals, shot lists, album descriptions, and marketing emails for photography businesses

plugins.name: teacher
plugins.description: Build lesson plans, create rubrics, and draft parent communications

plugins.name: event-planner
plugins.description: Create event proposals, vendor outreach, day-of timelines, and client updates for event planning

plugins.name: tradesperson
plugins.description: Write customer estimates, inspection reports, scopes of work, and follow-up emails for trades businesses

plugins.name: construction-pm
plugins.description: Create project estimates, change orders, progress reports, and RFI responses for construction project management
